raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Workload clarity","name":"Where do you feel your workload is heaviest right now?","description":"Identifies where workload might be unbalanced or unclear.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Lateness impact","name":"What do you think is contributing to your lateness?","description":"Explores potential causes behind being consistently late.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team interactions","name":"How are you finding the team dynamics lately?","description":"Surfaces issues or positive aspects in team collaboration.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What support from me would make a difference right now?","description":"Identifies specific needs for manager support.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priority alignment","name":"What feels misaligned between your priorities and the team's goals?","description":"Checks for alignment or misalignment in priorities.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Motivation drivers","name":"What's currently motivating you in your role?","description":"Explores sources of motivation or lack thereof.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Learning opportunities","name":"Where do you see the biggest opportunity for your growth right now?","description":"Surfaces areas where the person feels they can grow.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Time management","name":"How are you currently managing your time with your projects?","description":"Examines time management practices and potential issues.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Stress factors","name":"What factors are contributing most to your current stress levels?","description":"Identifies specific stressors impacting wellbeing.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Project enthusiasm","name":"Which current project are you most excited about and why?","description":"Reveals what projects they are most engaged with.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role clarity","name":"How clear do you feel about your role and its responsibilities?","description":"Checks clarity of role expectations and responsibilities.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Collaboration flow","name":"What could improve the flow of collaboration within the team?","description":"Explores potential improvements in team collaboration.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]}]}
